title: Verify Trial Corner Content Engagement Section Logic
description: Tests the logic of the 'Engagement' section, ensuring it shows resume-watching prompts or recommendations correctly.
preconditions: User A has started a show but watched less than 90%.
User B has finished a show (watched > 90%).
Both users are eligible for Trial Corner.

steps.description: 1. As User A, navigate to the Trial Corner.
3. As User B, navigate to the Trial Corner.

expected_result: For User A, the 'Engagement' section shows the in-progress content with an option to 'Resume Consuming'. For User B, the section shows the top recommended content in a similar genre, and its trailer should autoplay.
